name: tokenwatch
description: Lightweight TokenWatch SDK for simulated AI telemetry and observability testing.

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build:cjs: tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/cjs/package.json', JSON.stringify({ type: 'commonjs' }, null, 2) + '\n');"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:esm && npm run build:cjs
scripts.test: npm run build:esm && node --test test/sdk.test.js test/phase2-validation.test.js
